_schema_doc: P63 D-10 byte-shape sentinel for iterations.jsonl. TestIterationsJsonl_SchemaParity_AgainstGolden asserts generated record top-level keys are an EXACT SUBSET of the keys present in this object. Any new top-level field added to IterationRecord MUST update this golden in the same commit, otherwise the test fails. Captured from out/whatsapp-kb/iterations.jsonl line 1 (pre-P63-fix iter-1 record).
